gist.headline: Mapping the hive
gist.blurb: We just dropped comprehensive architecture diagrams into our developer docs. From GPU fleets to Cloudflare workers, see exactly how the hive operates under the hood.
gist.summary: Added detailed Mermaid architecture diagrams to the developer documentation, mapping out all models, providers, and infrastructure services.
gist.impact: Contributors can now easily visualize the entire pollinations.ai stack, making it easier to understand how our global fleet of GPUs and serverless workers fit together.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot examining a large, glowing architectural blueprint. The blueprint depicts a network of servers, clouds, and flowers connected by lines, representing the newly documented system architecture.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot looking at a large glowing blueprint map spread on a wooden table. The blueprint shows a network of tiny servers, clouds, and flowers connected by glowing lines. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
